{{Quote|I know I'm the prime heir to the Clan Secura, so I'm important that way. But my older brother Van, was supposed to be the prime heir, not me. He's the one my father really loved. When Van died I was the only heir left. My death would threaten his place in the clan and the clan's place on Ryloth. Deep down, my father wishes I was the one who had died and not Van. Sometimes…I wish it, too.|Nat Secura about his brother Van|<ref name="SW44" />}}
'''Van Secura''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] and [[Nat Secura]]'s older brother. He was the original heir apparent to [[Clan Secura]] but due to his untimely [[Death/Legends|death]], Nat became next in line. Nat commented that their father, [[Lon Secura]], always liked Van more.

{{Char-stub}}
